name: baseline_assaultcube
description: AssaultCube benign baseline. Launches ac_client.exe directly (bypassing the .bat launcher so PID scoping works), which auto-starts a scripted local bot match via the autostart config at ~/Documents/My Games/AssaultCube/v1.3/config/autostart/autostart-baseline.cfg. Fixed observation window, no player input. Establishes the noise floor for RQ4 attack-vs-benign discrimination and for the AssaultCube-cross-target comparison in RQ1.

extra.notes: 45s total run: 10s warmup (game launch + map load) + 30s in-game observation + 5s cooldown.
